title: OpenStax Principles of Economics 3e
description: A source card for the OpenStax Principles of Economics 3e textbook.

pages.text: OpenStax Principles of Economics 3e introduces scarcity, supply and demand, markets, labor, macroeconomic indicators, inflation, unemployment, trade, and policy.
Use this source for older students practicing evidence-based explanations about prices, incentives, tradeoffs, and economic data.
OpenStax books carry Creative Commons licenses. Check the linked book page for the exact license before mirroring chapters or figures.
